name: portfolio-lambda
description: Consolidated AWS Lambda for chat and admin functionality

scripts.deploy:build: npm run clean && npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build && npm run deploy:package
scripts.deploy:package:
mkdir -p deploy && cp -r dist node_modules prisma package.json deploy/ && cd deploy && zip -r lambda.zip . && cd .. && echo '
✅ Deployment package created: lambda/deploy/lambda.zip'
